space.name: The Mars Colony

Cho's distance is exactly 4 ly more than the colonist studying Fungus.
The colonist from Venus' distance is immediately next to the Medic.
The colonist from Callisto's distance is exactly 4 ly more than Bauer.
The colonist from Ceres' distance is higher than both the Pilot and the colonist in the Lumen module.
